titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Lamberto Pignotti Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Describing Archives: A Content Standard

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday November 29, 2018 at 04:19

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: The collection consists of writings, artwork, correspondence, printed material, photographs, and other papers documenting the life and work of Lamberto Pignotti. Writings include typescripts, notes, proofs, and biographical materials, as well as writings of others, notably artist manifestos relating to visual poetry. Artwork includes examples of visual poetry and collage. Correspondence includes letters, postcards, and telegrams from other Italian poets, artists, and organizations. Printed material includes clippings and exhibition catalogs, pamphlets and ephemera. Photographs consist of negatives and slides.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of writings, artwork, correspondence, printed material, photographs, and other papers documenting the life and work of Lamberto Pignotti. Writings include typescripts, notes, proofs, and biographical materials, as well as writings of others, notably artist manifestos relating to visual poetry. Artwork includes examples of visual poetry and collage. Correspondence includes letters, postcards, and telegrams from other Italian poets, artists, and organizations. Printed material includes clippings and exhibition catalogs, pamphlets and ephemera. Photographs consist of negatives and slides.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged roughly in the order in which it was received.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This material is open for research.
Box 9: Restricted fragile material. For further information consult the appropriate curator.

bioghist.head: Lamberto Pignotti
bioghist.p: Lamberto Pignotti (born 1926) is an Italian poet, writer and visual artist.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Lamberto Pignotti, Librairie Patrick Fréchet, and L'Arengario Studio Bibliographico on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2017.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Lamberto Pignotti Papers. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Lamberto Pignotti Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

did.unittitle: Sinestesie Varie, Tavole per cineagrafica: Immagini di lineagrafica

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains magazine clippings of advertisements, as well as other miscellaneous materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a printed copy of Bigrafia (1978), magazine clippings of advertisements, various typescripts, and other miscellaneous materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a printed copy of the homeopathic medical journal.

did.unittitle: Nascita della poesia: Pallazzo Braschi, Roma

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains approximately twenty manifestos of artists and poets of the visual poetry movement. Also contains notes, and hand-written and typed correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains material that may relate to "Nascita della poesia."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: newspapers and various handwritten and typed material.

did.unittitle: Parola / Immagine - La Scrittura - Tavole e Tipologie

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains magazine and newspaper clippings, as well as various printed material.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains magazine and newspaper clippings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: Gusto e Gusto Edizioni Officina Immagine, 1995, folio; Lamberto Pignotti - Ad Alta Voce (circa 2010); Fuluio Milani, photographic prints (circa 1981); Lamberto Pignotti - Che Cora Apparira'? (2016).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains paper collages, as well as various examples of visual poetry. Newspapers, magazines and other clippings are also present, as well as photographs from the 1960s, 1970s and 1990s. Projects include "Eat Poetry," "Arrabbiati," and "In America."

did.unittitle: Eat Poetry: Chewing Poems e Ostie di poesia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains an example of visual poetry, incorporating two sticks of chewing gum.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: magazine and newspaper clippings of advertments, often catagorized by themes, such as Expressionism and Futurism.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains printed material and magazine clippings, with extensive marginalia.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains typescripts with hand-written corrections.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains original manuscripts, typescripts and bibliographic notes. Also, contains "Ma parliamo d'Altro," and "Poesie Elettroniche."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letters, postcards and telegrams from various people and organizations, including: Carlo Rao, Alberto Cappi, Pietro Terminelli, Mariella Bettarini, Christian Kupchik, Giovanni Anceschi, Gilda Musa, Ubaldo Giacomucci, Jean-Marie Piemme, Giuseppe Conte, Betty Danon, Carlo Marcello Conti, Mercato del Sale, Franco Bolsi, Ennio Bonea, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letters, postcards and telegrams from various people and organizations, including: Alberto Frattini, Giovanni Fontana, Elio Grasso, Antonino Russo, V.S. Gaudio, Galleria Bonaparte, Lucio Vetri, Fernando de Filippi, Luciano Lattanzi, Ignazio Apolloni, Gio Ferri, Comune di Ancona, Comune di Bologna, Comune "La Croce," Festa Nazionale de L'Unità, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letters, postcards and telegrams from various people and organizations, including: Punto Zero, Comune di San Vito dei Normanni, Situazione '75, Agostino Contò, Omar Calabrese, Union of Serbian Writers, Galleria Civica d'Arte Moderna, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains various hand-written and typed material from authors and poets, including: Mario Socrate, Cesare Ruffato, Giuseppe Conte, Carlo Villa, Cesare Viviani, Valentino Zeichen, Franco Cordelli, Domenico Cara, Ennio Cavalli, Guido Savio, Mario Ramous, Pietro Terminelli, Paolo Turati, Lino Angiuli, Vito Riviello, Raffaella di Ambra, Gilberto Finzi, Roberto Gagno, Guido Ballo, Mario Baudino, Massimo Barone, Brandolini D'Adda, Carlo Bordini, and Mariella Bettarini, Alberto Cappi, Silvia Batisti, Patrizia Angelini, M. Angioni, Ignazio Apolloni, Adriano Accattino, Martellini, Angelo Maugeri, Felice Piemontese, Aldo Rostagno, Cesare Greppi, Roberto Linzalone, V.S. Gaudio, Giovanni Giuga, Massimo Gualtieri, and Michele Rak. Some printed material is also present.

did.unittitle: Il discorso confezionato - Tavole e tipologie

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains newspaper and magazine clippings.

did.unittitle: Foto di moda - Tipologie con didascalie

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains handwritten notes and clippings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains typescripts, with handwritten notes, as well as photocopies of various articles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains proof, composed of print-outs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains corrected typescripts and hand-written notes regarding "Poesia visiva sinestesia" and "Poesia."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains Ex Libris catalog clippings, as well as typescripts regarding experimental poetry.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains corrected typescripts and photocopies.

did.unittitle: Scritture convergenti - Litteratura e mass media

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains notes, corrected typescripts and photocopies.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains exhibition posters and material.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains exhibition pamphlets, cards and material.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains eight packages of negatives.

did.unittitle: Schedario con foto Poesie Visive ann. 70

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains note cards with images, as well as a small journal.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains handwritten biographical notes.

did.unittitle: Diapositive / Slides : Poesie visive mie e du altri autori

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains slides.

did.unittitle: Diapositive / Slides : Poesie visive mie e du altri autori

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains slides, held within boxes.

did.unittitle: Wall World, by E. Bambi and F.S. Dòdaro - "L. Pignotti - The Romanzi"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains two examples of oversize promotional material.
